overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a drive through a futuristic neon-lit city transitioning from dark urban canyons through a tunnel into bright daylight. The clip showcases ray-traced lighting effects as the vehicle navigates traffic and emerges onto an open highway with panoramic city views.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban highway canyon with neon signage

agents.ego_description: cruising through the neon-lit urban canyon, navigating between towering skyscrapers and under elevated highways

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: towering futuristic glass and steel buildings with illuminated windows lining the left side of the highway
large glowing red and blue holographic advertisement floating above the street
elevated concrete highway structure crossing overhead with support pillars
small white lucky cat figurine sitting on the dashboard near the windshield

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside a futuristic vehicle driving through a dark urban canyon. Towering cyberpunk skyscrapers line both sides while neon holographic billboards glow against the night sky. The vehicle cruises under elevated highway overpasses with moderate traffic ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: congested urban highway approaching tunnel entrance

events.description: traffic slows to a complete stop behind a yellow sports car in congestion
brief brightening as vehicle exits covered overpass area before tunnel entrance

agents.ego_description: slowing down and coming to a stop in heavy traffic congestion, waiting behind a yellow sports car

notable_agents.action: yellow sports car stopped directly ahead with brake lights illuminated

entered.detail: dark tunnel opening with concrete walls and overhead lighting fixtures becoming visible ahead
grey concrete lane divider separating the highway lanes

segments.scene_description: The vehicle slows dramatically as traffic congestion builds under the overpasses. The driver stops behind a yellow sports car, waiting in a queue of vehicles. The tunnel entrance becomes visible ahead as the scene transitions from purely artificial neon lighting to a mix of ambient and artificial light.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed highway tunnel with concrete walls and overhead lighting

events.description: entering fully enclosed tunnel with artificial lighting and concrete walls
bright daylight becomes visible at the tunnel exit ahead

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the enclosed tunnel, navigating between other vehicles while approaching the exit

entered.detail: smooth grey concrete tunnel walls with horizontal construction seams running alongside the vehicle
linear array of overhead fluorescent lights illuminating the tunnel ceiling

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a long concrete tunnel with artificial lighting replacing the natural light. The enclosed space features smooth grey walls and overhead fluorescent lights. Traffic flows steadily through the tunnel as the vehicle approaches the bright exit visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated open highway with panoramic city skyline view

events.description: exiting tunnel into bright daylight with full sky visibility and open cityscape
merging into faster traffic flow on the open highway

agents.ego_description: cruising at high speed on the open elevated highway, passing other vehicles with the futuristic city skyline visible ahead

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving parallel in the right lane

entered.detail: panoramic view of futuristic skyscrapers and towers visible in the bright daylight ahead
metal safety barrier running along the left side of the elevated highway
large commercial advertisement boards visible along the highway side

segments.scene_description: The vehicle bursts out of the tunnel into brilliant daylight, revealing a wide-open elevated highway with panoramic views of the futuristic city skyline. The scene transitions from enclosed artificial lighting to natural sunlight with clear blue skies. The driver accelerates into the flow of traffic, passing a black sedan while glass skyscrapers gleam in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from inside a vehicle as it moves from a neon-drenched urban canyon toward the mouth of a tunnel. It begins by cruising through a dark cityscape where towering skyscrapers and glowing holographic billboards frame the road under elevated highway overpasses. As the vehicle progresses, the fast-paced movement slows dramatically due to building traffic congestion, bringing the camera to a halt behind a yellow sports car. The scene then shifts from the vibrant, artificial glow of the night city toward the tunnel entrance ahead, where the lighting transitions into a blend of ambient and artificial tones.

The shot follows a continuous forward movement from the claustrophobic confines of an artificial tunnel into the expansive brilliance of a sunlit metropolis. It begins within a long concrete corridor where smooth grey walls and overhead fluorescent lights create a sterile, enclosed atmosphere. As the vehicle maintains its steady pace through traffic, the artificial glow gradually gives way to a piercing white light at the tunnel's exit. The scene then bursts open into brilliant daylight, shifting abruptly from the dim interior to a wide elevated highway under clear blue skies. Finally, the camera accelerates past a black sedan, revealing a panoramic skyline of gleaming glass skyscrapers that stretch across the horizon.
